svg.title: Rosy Strategic Signal Scanner Flow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing signal sources, Gemini-based filtering, report generation, email delivery, storage, and the AI Studio calibration loop.
svg.text: Who sends to whom, where signals are judged, and how the report reachesuser
Anthropic, Google, NVIDIA, OpenAI, a16z, etc.
low-score items are suppressed or dropped
dry-run until Gmail OAuth is configured
looks at output and judgment quality
updated after each round of testing
McKinsey, Goldman, real RSS, edge cases
This loop is where the prompt gets sharper: first prove relevance judgment, then tighten wording, then choose the cheapest model that stays reliable.
